title: Socialist Organizations
subtitle:
Mutual aid networks and community initiatives focused on building socialist
                    movements, advancing working class solidarity, and creating alternatives to capitalism.

initiatives.name: Freedom Road Socialist Organization
initiatives.description: A national organization fighting for working class liberation and socialism. FRSO works to build the people's struggle, promote solidarity between movements, and advance revolutionary theory and practice while supporting mutual aid initiatives across communities.

initiatives.name: Black Rose Anarchist Federation
initiatives.description: A national organization coordinating mutual aid and community power building through anarchist principles. They organize direct support initiatives, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building autonomous movements for liberation through local chapters, political education, and collective action.
